capabilities.description: Text-to-Speech conversion using Piper or System engines. Toggleable output.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F5, check status bar voice indicator toggles ON/OFF.
capabilities.notes: F5 toggle. Can be directed to Local or Web UI.

capabilities.description: Speech-to-Text conversion using System/Faster-Whisper engines. Toggleable listening.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F4, check status bar mic indicator toggles ON/OFF.

capabilities.description: Manual activation of the microphone via hotkey (Ctrl+Shift) or F8 toggle.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F8 to enable PTT, verify voice is only captured while holding hotkey.
